video.title: Sprinters Vs Puncheurs Fight For The First Maglia Rosa! | Giro D'Italia 2022 Stage 1 Highlights

transcript.clean_text: the 105th gerald italia began in the hungarian capital budapest a three-year wait for the grand de partensi was finally over and all of the stars were ready for the action tom dumoulin back at a grand tour matchup on the pool the pre-stage favorite an uphill finish in vichygrad down the road as the winner from three years ago richard carapaz was hoping to do his best to take another mariarosa well the opening day a two-star day according to the organizers 195 kilometers going through two intermediate sprints on the way the second coming at and finishing at vichygrad after a day that would be nervous the bunch not quite knowing exactly how things would finish out 5.6 kilometers at four percent twisting and turning to one of the most beautiful sights in the whole of hungary overlooking the danube bend who will be looking for pink at the end of the day well the start of the day was pretty straightforward two riders up the road both from the drawn hopper and ronnie jocatoli squad nobody else interested in joining them in the breakaway matia bais and philippe potaliani two riders yet to win a professional bike race in their careers stage one of this giro not really looking like it would be the day that they would break that duck the crowds were magnificent all the way along the route we were treated to special spectacles and historic reenactments too ten and a half minutes was the maximum gap before albacin fenix and anton martier went to work first intermediate sprint of the day was taken by the breakaway and behind points for the malaya chiclamino taken by a two-time winner giacco monizolo after a messy approach from those behind that was the only bit of excitement in the first half of the day but when things started to wind up towards the end ef education easy post had also helped the chase but with a few kilometers to go to the climb there were nerves everywhere the first few crashes appeared as well unfortunately and there was an almighty fight for that last right-hand turn tracknick going down van hooker with him as well and eric fetter of the iolo cometa team one of the three hungarian riders in the peloton all three would finally finish the race thankfully 176 riders still in the italia and alpacin fenix looking to become the number one they won the first road stage of last year's cheer up and they'd have to contend with attacks laurence nassen the first to have a go for azure dessert citroen the flemish rider wasn't even meant to be at this geode italia he got a late call and then was overtaken by leonard kemner of borah hand scrub he'd get a gap of just under 10 seconds but be caught just inside the final kilometers arnold de mar was one of the sprinters who was dropped david formula tried to set up diego olisi for a fast finish david villela wasn't far behind him but caleb ewan had survived one of the few big sprinters to still be there looking good in third position on the wheel of magnus court the dane riding for ef education easy post but then came the two pre-stage favorites binyam germai matya vonderpal sprinting to the line and a bizarre uphill crash as caleb trying so hard touched the wheel of gilmai he crashed and was out of the running fona paul the man to cross the line first just ahead of the eritrean and mature von pool on jeddah the italian debut taking the win the pain and disappointment etched on the face in the meantime of caleb congratulations for father paul after he came across he'll be pretty in pink tomorrow biniam gomei in the meantime will be wearing the white jersey for the best young rider a replay of that crash shows the touch of wheels between euan and gail might that meant that pale bilbao could roll over in third place to pick up four bonus seconds as well mata von nepal of alpacine fenix the first stage winner at early leader of the giro d'italia tv bilbao court kelderman karapas malama ulissi then a four second gap to another group led home by andrea vendrame a dutchman takes pink on stage one just as he did five years ago that was tom dumoulin then he went on to win that jiro thunderpool won't realistically go on to win this one but hoping to try and keep the jersey he has a four second lead over guillermo six ahead of bilbao 10 ahead of the next group as they go into a 9.2 kilometer time trial for day two all on the streets of the hungarian capital budapest 20 corners roughly before they get to the final climb to the line that's just over a kilometer long time check at the bottom and king of the mountains points at the top it's budapest to budapest one of the only two time trials that take place at this year's judo so the tour of italy at its start in hungary underway fona paul takes the stage and pink crashes behind and drama to the last that's the g dot and we hope you'll join us live for stage two
